deep_dive.title: Memory-Conditioned Tool Calling for Camera-First Visual Agents
deep_dive.abstract: Recognition tells an agent what is in an image; personal memory affects what is worth looking up next. In a camera-first setting the user can send only an image, so the agent must form the lookups. We study whether personal visual memory improves agent-side tool choice and tool arguments, and thereby more user-aligned multi-tool lookups. The design uses a three-layer personal visual memory (profile, short-term focus, observations) that is loaded on each turn to condition an LLM tool-calling loop under camera-first intake, and includes conflict-aware write-back intended to refresh the user model for later captures. On 800 images paired with synthetic memory blocks constructed for controlled ablation, removing the full three-layer memory block reduces tool-query relevance by 0.47 points absolute (4.21 -> 3.74 on a 5-point scale; 11.2% relative) and end-to-end utility by 0.082 absolute (0.842 -> 0.760; 9.7% relative). These results measure memory conditioning of tool policy under image-only intake with fixed synthetic blocks, not multi-session write-back from live user histories.
deep_dive.llm_evidence_en: personal visual memory for user-aligned tool calling in LLM agents
deep_dive.llm_evidence_cn: 个人视觉记忆用于LLM代理中用户对齐的工具调用
deep_dive.llm_evidence: 个人视觉记忆用于LLM代理中用户对齐的工具调用
deep_dive.canonical_evidence: 个人视觉记忆用于LLM代理中用户对齐的工具调用
deep_dive.llm_tldr_en: This paper investigates whether personal visual memory improves agent-side tool choice and arguments in a camera-first setting, using a three-layer memory to condition LLM tool-calling loops and demonstrating that memory removal reduces tool-query alignment.
deep_dive.llm_tldr_cn: 该论文研究在相机优先的视觉代理中，个人视觉记忆是否能改善代理端工具选择和参数，从而实现更用户对齐的多工具查找。它设计了一个三层个人视觉记忆（个人档案、短期焦点、观测记录），在每个回合加载以条件化LLM工具调用循环，并包括冲突感知写回以更新用户模型。在800张图像上的实验表明，移除完整的三层记忆块会降低工具查询的对齐度，验证了个人记忆对个性化代理行为的重要性。
deep_dive.llm_tldr: 该论文研究在相机优先的视觉代理中，个人视觉记忆是否能改善代理端工具选择和参数，从而实现更用户对齐的多工具查找。它设计了一个三层个人视觉记忆（个人档案、短期焦点、观测记录），在每个回合加载以条件化LLM工具调用循环，并包括冲突感知写回以更新用户模型。在800张图像上的实验表明，移除完整的三层记忆块会降低工具查询的对齐度，验证了个人记忆对个性化代理行为的重要性。

quick_skim.title: Contrastive-Augmented Flow Matching for Style-Content Disentanglement
quick_skim.abstract: Learning representations that separate content and style is crucial for controllable generation and compositional generalization. However, diffusion and flow-based models trained primarily with generative objectives often produce entangled or misaligned factors. To address this gap, we introduce Contrastive Augmented Flow Matching (CAtFM), a framework that integrates contrastive regularization into an invertible flow matching formulation to promote structured content-style representations. Rather than constraining intermediate latents or velocity fields, we apply contrastive supervision to predicted endpoints during training, enforcing semantic consistency across transported distributions while allowing disentanglement to emerge implicitly, without assuming strictly pure or fully factorized content and style representations. Our main experiments operate in the CLIP embedding space, with additional validation using frozen DINO and ALIGN encoders. Across synthetic data, in-domain styles, and real-world benchmarks (ImageNet, WikiArt, DomainNet, and DTD), CAtFM improves content and style retrieval, enhances embedding cluster separation, and achieves stronger open-set robustness compared to generative and discriminative baselines. Overall, CAtFM provides a simple way to couple discriminative constraints with deterministic transport, improving disentanglement and robustness under distribution shift.
quick_skim.llm_evidence_cn: 风格内容解耦用于可控生成
quick_skim.llm_evidence: 风格内容解耦用于可控生成
quick_skim.canonical_evidence: 风格内容解耦用于可控生成
quick_skim.llm_tldr_en: Proposes contrastive augmented flow matching to separate style and content in generative models, enabling controllable generation useful for personalization.
quick_skim.llm_tldr_cn: 针对扩散和流模型训练中风格与内容纠缠的问题，提出对比增强流匹配框架，通过对比监督学习端点表示来促进结构化的风格-内容表示。该方法无需假设即实现解耦，为个性化生成中的风格控制提供了通用技术。
quick_skim.llm_tldr: 针对扩散和流模型训练中风格与内容纠缠的问题，提出对比增强流匹配框架，通过对比监督学习端点表示来促进结构化的风格-内容表示。该方法无需假设即实现解耦，为个性化生成中的风格控制提供了通用技术。

quick_skim.title: Configurable AI Coding Assistants: Designing For Developers Who Like to Be in Control
quick_skim.abstract: AI coding assistants are now widely used in professional development, yet they offer only limited ways for developers to control how they behave. In this paper, we investigate what kinds of configurations experienced developers want in coding assistants, how they prioritize different types of configuration needs, and which interface mechanisms they prefer. We first synthesize product documentation and prior research on trust and personalization to compile a list of 33 configuration options, grouped into four categories: Code suggestions, System & policies, Human-assistant interaction, and Users & their personal context. We then conduct a survey with 56 professional developers and 7 design sessions in which participants arrange configurations into their perfect control board and talk about their needs and experiences in more depth.   Developers report strong interest in configurability: 72.6% of usefulness ratings are positive, while only around a third indicate that the corresponding configuration is known to participants in their tools. Demand is particularly high for task-related controls such as minimum confidence thresholds, visibility of suggestion quality, and response length, whereas many persona-related configurations are seen as unnecessary. In this paper, we discuss the implications for designing more unified and discoverable configuration surfaces for future coding assistants
quick_skim.llm_evidence_cn: AI编程助手的个性化配置研究
quick_skim.llm_evidence: AI编程助手的个性化配置研究
quick_skim.canonical_evidence: AI编程助手的个性化配置研究
quick_skim.llm_tldr_en: A study on developer preferences for configuring AI coding assistants, identifying 33 configuration options across four categories.
quick_skim.llm_tldr_cn: AI编程助手广泛使用但缺乏个性化控制。本文调研了56位专业开发者，总结了33项配置需求并分类为代码建议、系统策略、人机交互和用户个人背景四类。通过调查和设计研讨，发现开发者希望更多控制权，并偏好直观的配置界面。该研究为设计个性化编程助手提供了用户中心的设计指导。
quick_skim.llm_tldr: AI编程助手广泛使用但缺乏个性化控制。本文调研了56位专业开发者，总结了33项配置需求并分类为代码建议、系统策略、人机交互和用户个人背景四类。通过调查和设计研讨，发现开发者希望更多控制权，并偏好直观的配置界面。该研究为设计个性化编程助手提供了用户中心的设计指导。

quick_skim.title: SlimPer: Make Personalization Model Slim and Smart
quick_skim.abstract: Transformer-style architectures are increasingly adopted for industrial recommendation systems, yet they inherit a design premise misaligned with the task: generative models rely on per-token autoregressive prediction, which justifies maintaining large intermediate tensors that scale with sequence length. In contrast, recommendation systems produce a single set of relevance scores for each <user, item> pair without token-level supervision. Leveraging this observation, we propose SlimPer, which reformulates personalized ranking as iterative refinement of a compact, unified <user, item> knowledge base. At each layer, the model selectively queries raw multi-modal user-side tokens, computes explicit relevance matching scores, and refines the knowledge base, all in O(N) per-layer cost with a fixed-size intermediate representation. As a result, model depth is decoupled from user history length, enabling deeper relevance understanding without proportional growth in compute or memory; request-only optimization further trims memory by sharing a single copy of user-side tokens across all candidate items. SlimPer unifies sparse, dense, and sequence features within a single backbone and provides inherent interpretability through its attention mechanism. Deployed on Instagram Reels and Feed, SlimPer yields measurable improvements in user engagement while streamlining the overall system and enabling effective modeling of 10k+ fine-grained user history events.
quick_skim.llm_tldr_en: SlimPer reformulates personalized ranking as iterative refinement of a unified user-item knowledge base, achieving efficient personalization.
quick_skim.llm_tldr_cn: 针对推荐系统中Transformer架构与大中间张量不匹配的问题，提出SlimPer框架。将个性化排名建模为统一用户-物品知识库的迭代精化，通过选择性查询多模态用户侧标记并计算相关性分数，在保持O(N)复杂度下实现高效个性化。实验证明其在推荐任务上达到SOTA。
quick_skim.llm_tldr: 针对推荐系统中Transformer架构与大中间张量不匹配的问题，提出SlimPer框架。将个性化排名建模为统一用户-物品知识库的迭代精化，通过选择性查询多模态用户侧标记并计算相关性分数，在保持O(N)复杂度下实现高效个性化。实验证明其在推荐任务上达到SOTA。

quick_skim.title: Where Reasoning Matters: Rethinking Latent Reasoning in Semantic ID-based Generative Recommendation
quick_skim.abstract: Semantic ID-based generative recommendation predicts an item by generating a short sequence of semantic ID tokens, where each token is produced autoregressively. Latent reasoning has recently been introduced to improve this process through additional hidden-state computation before each token decision. This raises a practical question: when one item is represented by a sequence of semantic ID tokens, should each token receive the same fixed number of latent refinement steps, or should these steps be allocated more effectively across positions? We study this question through position-wise information-gain (IG), which measures how much each semantic ID position reduces the uncertainty of the target item. We observe that earlier semantic ID positions usually provide higher information-gain, while later positions contribute less additional information. We further analyze that applying more refinement to high-IG positions tends to bring larger expected benefits. Based on this observation, we propose IBA, an Information-Gain Budget Allocation framework for semantic ID-based generative recommendation. IBA treats latent refinement steps as a limited computational resource and learns how to allocate them across semantic ID positions, assigning more refinement to informative positions and less to positions with smaller contribution. Experiments on multiple public datasets show that IBA consistently improves strong generative recommendation baselines and achieves a better accuracy--computation trade-off than fixed or poorly matched step allocations.
quick_skim.llm_evidence_en: generative recommendation with semantic IDs for personalized item predictions
quick_skim.llm_evidence_cn: 基于语义ID的生成式推荐实现个性化物品预测
quick_skim.llm_evidence: 基于语义ID的生成式推荐实现个性化物品预测
quick_skim.canonical_evidence: 基于语义ID的生成式推荐实现个性化物品预测
quick_skim.llm_tldr_en: Studies position-wise information gain in semantic ID-based generative recommendation, improving personalization by allocating reasoning steps effectively.
quick_skim.llm_tldr_cn: 在语义ID生成式推荐中，每个ID token的推理步骤分配不均。通过位置信息增益分析，提出更有效的步骤分配策略，优化生成排序中的个性化推荐效果。实验表明该方法提升了推荐准确度，为个性化内容生成提供了新视角。
quick_skim.llm_tldr: 在语义ID生成式推荐中，每个ID token的推理步骤分配不均。通过位置信息增益分析，提出更有效的步骤分配策略，优化生成排序中的个性化推荐效果。实验表明该方法提升了推荐准确度，为个性化内容生成提供了新视角。

quick_skim.title: Personalizing Incremental Video Search with Hybrid Text and ID Embeddings
quick_skim.abstract: Incremental video search requires high-quality ranking after each keystroke, where intent is often underspecified (e.g., 1-3 character prefixes). We present a personalization system for Apple TV search that combines complementary semantic and collaborative signals at ranking time. Our approach learns two item embedding spaces: (i) a text-based multilingual encoder (TextEmb) fine-tuned on co-engagement triplets via contrastive learning, and (ii) an ID-based collaborative embedding model (IdEmb) trained on interaction-derived positives. At serving time, we construct user representations from recent watch history and inject text- and ID-based user-item cosine similarities into a pairwise XGBoost ranker.   We evaluate with temporally held-out offline datasets and a three-week online controlled experiment. Offline, for sessions with user history, the personalized ranker improves NDCG@10 by 2.99% and MRR by 3.30% over the non-personalized baseline. Slice analyses show that personalization is most needed in incremental search, where intent is still forming: on ambiguous prefix queries (1-3 characters), NDCG@10 lift is +8.63%, versus +1.46% on longer, fully specified queries. Longer-history users benefit more: NDCG lift rises from +2.13% for users with 1-5 history items to +4.37% for users with 51-100, even though baseline relevance is lower for these cohorts (NDCG@10 drops from 0.733 to 0.680), indicating that personalization adds the most value where default ranking underperforms. Online, treatment yields statistically significant gains of +1.14% tap-through rate and +1.23% conversion rate, with a 2.91% improvement in converted-item rank position. We further analyze coverage-precision trade-offs between semantic and collaborative embeddings via ablations isolating each signal, and evaluate embedding quality on a held-out corpus with LLM-judged similarity labels to reduce click/exposure bias.
quick_skim.llm_evidence_en: personalization for video search with user history
quick_skim.llm_evidence_cn: 利用用户历史实现视频搜索个性化
quick_skim.llm_evidence: 利用用户历史实现视频搜索个性化
quick_skim.canonical_evidence: 利用用户历史实现视频搜索个性化
quick_skim.llm_tldr_en: A personalization system for video search that combines text and collaborative embeddings, improving ranking quality for underspecified queries.
quick_skim.llm_tldr_cn: 增量视频搜索中用户输入短前缀时意图不明确，需要个性化辅助。本文为Apple TV搜索设计了一个排序系统，融合文本嵌入和协同过滤嵌入，利用用户观看历史构建表示，并通过XGBoost排序。离线实验表明该方法显著提升了搜索准确性。该工作展示了在多模态搜索中结合语义和协作信息的个性化有效性。
quick_skim.llm_tldr: 增量视频搜索中用户输入短前缀时意图不明确，需要个性化辅助。本文为Apple TV搜索设计了一个排序系统，融合文本嵌入和协同过滤嵌入，利用用户观看历史构建表示，并通过XGBoost排序。离线实验表明该方法显著提升了搜索准确性。该工作展示了在多模态搜索中结合语义和协作信息的个性化有效性。
quick_skim.matched_query_text: Papers central to 请帮我查找个性化生成、个性化模型的论文, especially work that connects or combines: p; personalized generation techniques; personalized model adaptation; user personalization in generative models; personalized content generation methods; methods for personalized multimodal generation; research on personalized text generation; studies of personalization in large language models; methods for personalized image generation.
